subject: Technijian — SOW for Signature: AI Advisory — Pet Care Plus
doc_subject: Statement of Work — AI Consulting and Automation (Fractional CTO Advisory)

documents.label: Statement of Work — AI Consulting and Automation

parties.intro: Please review and sign the attached Statement of Work for the AI Consulting and Automation Fractional CTO Advisory engagement. This is a time-and-materials engagement at $250/hr CTO Advisory, invoiced weekly every Friday for hours worked in that week. The document has already been counter-signed by Ravi Jain on Technijian's side.
